title: IncidentRecord
description: A single cross-run incident-memory record: the diagnosed root cause and proposed fix for one step's retry-exhaustion failure, scoped to one SUT (sut_fingerprint) and persisted at ~/.qtea/incident-memory/<sut_fingerprint>/<incident_id>.json so future runs against the same SUT can reuse the diagnosis instead of re-investigating from scratch. Written once by qtea.incident_memory.record_incident() at the end of the debug/fix-proposal chain (steps/base.py::_run_fix_proposal); never mutated in place (one file per incident, no read-modify-write).

incident_id.description: uuid4 hex; also the filename stem of this record.

schema_version.description: Record schema version. Bump when fields change in a non-backward-compatible way.

sut_fingerprint.description: sha256[:16] of the normalized git remote URL or resolved local path of the SUT (see qtea.incident_memory.sut_fingerprint). Directory name under incident-memory/.

recorded_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when the incident was recorded.

run_id.description: The qtea run that diagnosed this incident (provenance/audit only — not dereferenced by retrieval).

step_name.description: Human-readable step name at the time of failure.

attempt.description: Attempt count at final failure (typically MAX_ATTEMPTS).

category.description: qtea.failure_classifiers.FailureCategory value — reused taxonomy, not a new one.

symptom_tags.description: Lowercase keyword tokens derived from the failure signature, category, and step name. Used by query_similar() for Jaccard-overlap scoring.

failure_signature.description: Short, redacted summary of the failure (first line(s) of the error). Used for difflib.SequenceMatcher scoring against future failures.

failure_context_excerpt.description: Redacted excerpt of the failure_context markdown passed into the debug/fix chain.

rca_excerpt.description: Redacted excerpt of the debug agent's root-cause analysis (debug_rca_text).

fix_strategy_excerpt.description: Redacted excerpt of the critical-thinking agent's fix-strategy.md content.

fix_proposal_path.description: Best-effort, workspace-relative path to step-NN-fix-proposal.md at write time. Provenance only — not guaranteed to still exist; not dereferenced by retrieval (the excerpts above are self-sufficient).

resolved.description: Always false in v1 (no consumer flips this yet). Reserved for a v2 self-heal / operator-confirmation loop that marks an incident's fix as verified.

outcome_notes.description: Reserved for v2. Null in v1.
